title: Weekday coffee break offer
summary: Save on a relaxed coffee and pastry visit from Monday to Friday.
description: Guests receive a special price on selected coffee and pastry combinations during quieter weekday hours.
terms: Offer applies to selected dine-in or takeaway items and cannot be combined with other promotions.
body: Plan an easy midday visit with a coffee and pastry set prepared for regular weekday service.
The offer is designed for guests who want a quick cafe break without turning it into a full meal.
highlights: Available every weekday during lunch hours
Applies to selected coffee and pastry items
Good for dine-in or takeaway when available

title: Family pastry box
summary: Take home a small pastry box for family visits, guests, or a shared coffee table.
description: Families can receive a special price on selected pastry boxes and dessert sets.
terms: Offer depends on pastry availability and may require advance order for larger boxes.
body: A pastry box makes a family coffee table easier to plan.
This offer helps guests take Wake Cup pastries home for a small gathering or quiet evening.
highlights: Can include selected pastries or desserts
Advance order is recommended for larger sets

title: Birthday coffee bonus
summary: Make a birthday cafe visit feel more personal with a small Wake Cup bonus.
description: Birthday guests may receive a complimentary dessert, drink, or discount when visiting with friends.
terms: Guest may need to show proof of birthday. Offer depends on current cafe rules and availability.
body: A birthday does not always need a large event to feel memorable.
This bonus gives guests a simple reason to celebrate with coffee, pastries, and a warm table.
highlights: Can include dessert, drink, or discount
Advance message is recommended for groups

title: Coffee and dessert combo
summary: Take a small break with a special price for coffee and dessert together.
description: Guests can order selected specialty coffee and dessert combinations at a better price during quieter hours.
terms: Offer applies to selected coffee and dessert combinations while available.
body: Coffee time is a simple way to turn an ordinary afternoon into a pleasant pause.
This combo is designed for guests who want a warm drink, a small dessert, and a comfortable table without planning a full meal.
highlights: Good for cafe guests and takeaway coffee stops
